MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Defendants Subpoena To Plaintiffs Former Employer, Comcast Of California I, Inc. And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Learn It, Inc. And Its Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MYTHILLY SIVARAJAH OF THE ADAMS NYE BECHT LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-982-8955 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHARMAINE YU, TEL. NO. 1-415-772-5729 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT LEARN IT INC.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KHOURY'S Motion To Quash Defendants Subpoena To Plaintiffs Former Employer, Comcast Of California I, Inc. And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Learn It, Inc. And Its Counsel - Plaintiff Michael Khoury's motion to quash subpoena to Comcast is denied. Defendant Learn It has established that the documents sought by the subpoena are directly relevant to its defense that Mr. Khoury falsified requests for mileage reimbursement. While the documents sought by the subpoena are within the zone of Mr. Khoury's right of privacy, because of the particularized showing made by Learn It Mr. Khoury's right of privacy is outweighed by Learn It's need for the documents. Learn It is required to maintain the confidentiality of the documents and must not use or disclose them for any purpose other than for this lawsuit. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Defendant S Subpoenas ... Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mythily Sivarajah of Adams Nye Becht LLP telephone number 415-982-8955 for Plaintiff Michael Khoury.
Charmaine Yu of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP telephone number 415-772-5729 for Defendant Learn It, Inc.

Judge Kahn made a disclosure regarding his relationship with Ms. Yu and stated that he does not believe it will have an impact on his ability to be fair and impartial. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling with additional language. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KHOURY'S Motion To Quash Defendant's Subpoenas to plaintiff's former employers is granted without prejudice to the subpoenas being re-served down the road upon a more particularized showing. Request for sanctions Denied. Defendant Learn It has not shown sufficient grounds to warrant obtaining the documents sought by the subpoenas. Because the documents are within Mr. Khoury's "zone of privacy," Learn It must show that the documents are directly relevant to the claims or defenses in this case, which it has not done. Learn It's position on this motion does not lack substantial justification. The court will not provide a court reporter for this discovery hearing. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
